exercism.heading: What makes Exercism special?
exercism.intro: Exercism is a longstanding nonprofit that's helped over 2.5 million people level-up their coding skills.
exercism.studentsDesc: We've grown entirely by word of mouth. Good friends tell their friends about Exercism!
exercism.testimonialsDesc: We've been one of the most trusted resources for coding education for over a decade.
exercism.exercisesDesc: Our exercises are trusted by the coding community as the perfect way to level up!
exercism.mentoringDesc: Our unique mentoring program is one of the best ways to get tips from experts!

signupSection.intro: The Coding Fundamentals curriculum is completely free. No card. No trial. No catch.

faqs.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
faqs.introPrefix: These are the questions we get asked the most. Your question not answered here?
faqs.q1a1: The Coding Fundamentals exercises — the core learn-to-code curriculum — are completely free. No card, no trial, no catch.
faqs.q2: How much time will I need to spend each week on the course?
faqs.q2a: You can spend as long or as little as you like. Most people get through the Coding Fundamentals strand in 12–20 weeks at around 5–10 hours a week. The Build with Jeremy strand is ongoing — you can dip in and out as new episodes go up, and join livestreams when it suits you.
faqs.q3: How hard is the course? How smart do I need to be?
faqs.q3a1: The course is designed to be accessible to everyone, regardless of your background. We don't believe you need to be "smart" to learn to code. But you do need to put in the effort and be willing to be challenged.
faqs.q3a2: But if you put in the effort, ask for help when you get stuck, and embrace the challenge, you'll be amazed at how far you can go in a short time.
faqs.q4a1: Yes — you can sign up and start the free Coding Fundamentals curriculum today.
faqs.q4a2: The first Build with Jeremy session will be in mid-June. You can sign up for a reminder once you're inside.
faqs.q5: I already signed up to the Bootcamp - is this different?
faqs.q5a1: Thanks for being part of the Bootcamp! Jiki is the next stage in the evolution of our Bootcamp. Most of the exercises you solved will appear in Jiki along with lots more. We've also broken down the 3 hour videos into smaller, 5-10 minute chunks to make watching easier!
faqs.q5a2: As a member of the Bootcamp, you'll automatically get Jiki Premium for Life. This applies to both the initial Coding Fundamentals course and future courses.

latestNews.heading: Our latest news
latestNews.subheadingPrefix: Keep up to date with what's happening at Jiki in

welcome.headingRest: The way you learn needs to change too.
welcome.para1: In 2026, anyone can open Cursor and create a fully-functional product in minutes. Maybe you've done it yourself! Something that would have taken you years to learn to make in the past is now available in seconds. So what does it mean to be a developer now? What does it mean to have a career in tech?
welcome.para2: Here's a secret no-one tells you. Software engineering has never been about writing code. Coding is how you communicate with the computer, but the real skill has always been in critical-thinking, in problem solving, in building and architecting. It's always been about taking ideas and turning them into reality.
welcome.para3: Thanks to LLMs you don't have to spend years mastering coding in order to be useful. But you still have a lot to learn! You still need to learn coding fundamentals. You need to learn how everything works. You need to learn how to build. But the journey is much more fun than it's ever been before. And I'm here to be your guide on that journey!
welcome.hiThere: Hi there! <wave>👋</wave> I'm Jeremy, and I've helped over <highlight>two million people</highlight> level up their coding skills.
welcome.para4: For 20 years, I've been telling people that want to get into tech to get really good at writing code, and then start to work out how to make real apps. But now, thanks to LLMs - that advice is upside down.
welcome.para5: If you're starting out today then most of your work is going to be reading code, not writing it. And that means something that's a little sad for me to admit...
welcome.heading2: Getting good at writing code is becoming irrelevant 😢
welcome.para6: You are never going to be better than an LLM at writing code. I have been coding for 34 years and LLMs are at my level. You won't catch up.
welcome.para7: BUT, and this is the big but, you don't need to! I almost never write code now. I let the LLMs do it for me, and you can too. Instead we get to do more of the actual interesting stuff. And that's what I'm going to teach you in this course!
welcome.para8: I think it's incredibly exciting for you to be starting out today. You don't need to spend 10 years mastering a skill to be useful. You can start doing real things straight away!
welcome.para9: I started coding when I was 8. Back then, YouTube didn't exist. There weren't any "learn to code" websites. I didn't even have the internet. There was basically only one way to learn. Make stuff. Lots of stuff!
welcome.rhodriAlt: Jeremy and Rhodri in 1998 making their first paid website
welcome.captionShort: 1998: Me making the first website I ever got paid for.
welcome.captionLong: 1998: Me and Rhodri making the first website we ever got paid for.
welcome.para10Prefix: And make stuff I did! I started making games and then graduated to making little bots to play against. And as I grew older I made websites for me and my friends, and
welcome.para11: I created, I played, I experimented. I had fun!
welcome.para12: And through this, I got really good. I learned the coder mindset, and I laid the foundations that I've built my whole career on.
welcome.heading4: <highlight>The two parts</highlight> to learning programming today...
welcome.para13: We've made a different type of course. One that teaches you the fundamentals of programming differently, and gets you building fun things and solving interesting problems alongside me. It has two parts:
welcome.listItem1: Learn coding fundamentals. We'll teach you the fundamentals of coding so you can understand what an LLM is building - as essential as ever.
welcome.listItem2: Learn how to build. Work alongside me as I make real projects with LLMs and show you everything you need to know to be a real developer. Join me for livestreams, ask questions, come and have fun making stuff!
welcome.para14: Within a few months, you'll go from zero to being able to build games like Space Invaders, Tic Tac Toe, and Breakout in code from scratch. And in parallel, you'll be learning how to make real-world projects, using databases, adding auth, using APIs, deploying websites... Doing all the real stuff that developers do!
welcome.para15: If all <highlight>this sounds exciting</highlight>, then I'd love for you to join us! 💙
welcome.para16Prefix: The core "learn to code" curriculum is entirely free - over 200 hours of fun challenges to hone your skills. And the rest, where you get to follow me as I teach you how to build things, costs only
welcome.para16Suffix: (as cheap as we can make it and still pay the bills!)
welcome.para17Prefix: Want more details? Or to hear from others that I've taught? Read on below for even more details or
welcome.ctaButton: Enough with all the talking! Let's do this!

bootcamp.menuIntro: The course has two strands: Coding Fundamentals and Building in the Age of LLMs.
bootcamp.part1Intro: We're going to help you <highlight>build rock solid coding foundations.</highlight> We'll cover all the core concepts in programming and give you tons of exercises and projects to practice with.
bootcamp.part1Item1Suffix: , including flow control, conditionals, data types, functions, and much more, using a beginner-friendly version of JavaScript.
bootcamp.part1Item2: Gain the confidence to put your knowledge into practice, being able to solve a wide variety of problems, using the right concept at the right time.
bootcamp.part1Item3: Develop the Coder's Mind. You'll notice that your critical thinking, problem solving, and logic skills are all improving.
bootcamp.part1Item4: A base to build on. Whatever type of programming you want to do, this is the base you need, and one you can easily build on.
bootcamp.levelsSideheading: Students normally take 1-2 weeks per level.
bootcamp.levelsIntro: From day one you'll be building fun things. You'll start by drawing, then animating, then making games, then building intelligence into your programs. Every level has lots of fun challenges!
bootcamp.levelsSubIntro: Here are just a few of the fun things you'll make! 👇
bootcamp.level2: In level 2 you get familiar with coding basics through some drawing puzzles.
bootcamp.level3: In level 3 you'll learn how to make things move for the first time.
bootcamp.flowerLevel: Your first major project is to animate flipbook-style using variables and loops.
bootcamp.level7: By level 7 you'll start building some intelligence into your code.
bootcamp.level10: In level 10 you use repeatable chunks of code to eliminate duplication.
bootcamp.level12: Level 12 introduces lists, your first compound data type, and Wordle!
bootcamp.level14: Level 14 focusses on coding mindset and solving a hard project.
bootcamp.level16: In Level 16 you unlock dictionaries making Emoji Collector possible.
bootcamp.level20: By Level 20 you're able to build complex programs with intertwining ideas.
bootcamp.levelEnd: And by the end of the course you're building games like Breakout!
bootcamp.buildingIntro: In the LLM-era, you also need to get up to speed on how to create things, how to work with an LLM safely. So...
bootcamp.part2Heading: 2. Building in the Age of LLMs 🚀
bootcamp.part2Intro: Alongside learning to code, we'll deep dive into how technology works. We'll <highlight>build real projects together</highlight>, digging into databases, creating secure auth, learning about frontends vs backends, and much much more.
bootcamp.part2Item1: Building From Scratch: Join me as I build a whole platform from scratch. Spin up an LLM and you can follow along with your own project idea. I'll teach you how to make good decisions and guide your LLM safely.
bootcamp.part2Item2: Topic Deep Dives: I'll talk you through how complex platforms like Exercism and Jiki work, deep-diving into the code we've written and share my learnings with you!
bootcamp.part2Item3: Regular Q&A Livestreams. Something not clicking? Need help with your projects? Submit your questions and I'll answer them with you on our regular livestreams.
bootcamp.certificatePara1: At the end of the course, we'll issue you an official certificate to recognise your participation and completion of the course.
bootcamp.certificatePara2: Show off your skills on your resume and in the Certifications section of your LinkedIn profile.
bootcamp.linkedinShare: Share your certificate in your network

testimonials.heading: What do our students think?
testimonials.subheadingPrefix: These are some extracts from what our beta users said.
testimonials.primaryQuote: Seeing how much effort, thought, and even love is put into this course, it's such a pleasure to be a student here. Every explanation, each exercise turn this course into a masterpiece. I really enjoy it.
testimonials.fred: As someone with no previous coding experience - I've been blown away with the quality of this course. I've come so far in the past weeks and reflecting on what I've achieved and how much I've learned has been phenomenal. My journey has been from a complete coding novice, to someone who is confident and excited to tackle complex logic problems in code!
testimonials.shaun: I was brand new to coding and this course exceeded my wildest expectations and then some. In my humble opinion, it will be one of the best choices you will ever make!
testimonials.lucas: From the moment I bought the course, I realized it would be different from anything I had ever experienced in terms of classes and studying. Learning while actually coding has made it pretty fun. Getting help and encouraging messages from the community, sharing their experiences, and knowing that you're not alone made things much easier. It's such a pleasure to be part of it!
testimonials.nolan: Getting into programming always felt overwhelming. I often quit before I really got started. However, the course has provided an excellent, guided path to self-sufficiency, and I now feel capable of growing and learning more in the field.
testimonials.redrobio: This course has pushed me past what I thought were personal limitations, and in doing so, has increased my confidence and motivation. Know that when you get the certificate at the end of the course, it will be because you EARNED it!
testimonials.matt: I joined the course with some Python knowledge, looking to learn front-end languages. I'd been struggling with self-paced learning, so I signed up for the structure and accountability. The teaching style — full of effective analogies — really clicked with me. In just 10 weeks, I've learned new material and gained clarity on topics I thought I already understood. Fantastic mentors, teaching, community, and global cohort. The course has exceeded my expectations—I'd highly recommend it!
testimonials.abhinav: The course provided me an opportunity to learn from a bonafide master. The purchasing power parity discount made it even more affordable. Thank you for making it accessible.
testimonials.laura: I'd recommend this to anyone trying to become a better programmer. I have done a fair bit of tutorial material online to learn programming but this course does the best job in teaching you the fundamentals. This course has given me confidence in writing code and made it fun! 😄.
testimonials.oleksandra2: Before I started this course I didn't think I could do the exercises we do now. I thought I am not smart enough, that "this is not for me" and I didn't expect anything which required so much effort to be here in the fundamentals of programming. But in the end, Jeremy shows it's yet another skill that can be learnt, even in such a short period of time.
testimonials.kazzybits: I had doubts that I would understand this kind of material, and yet as I look back to where I started, I have a deep appreciation for the incredible skills and knowledge I am now nurturing and growing. How I think about thinking, and about problem solving in general, has changed dramatically since undertaking this course. I can't wait to see what's next!
testimonials.vignesh: I joined this course with some coding experience, but the clarity and structure made everything click like never before and the lessons are perfectly paced, building concepts step-by-step in a way that feels natural and engaging. It's a transformative learning experience that leaves you feeling motivated and excited to keep pushing your coding skills to the next level.
testimonials.rick: Honestly, I had no expectations when I stumbled upon Jiki, but it turned out to be my greatest discovery of the year! Given the cost, I didn't hesitate to join and give it a try. I had no experience whatsoever, and I'm very impressed with myself looking at what I can do! 100% recommended!
testimonials.artigiani: The course has been a game-changer for me.The pace is perfect: challenging yet not impossible. The exercises are very nice, and it is incredibly satisfying to see that in just a few weeks one can pass from simply moving a blob in a maze to program one that solve EVERY maze.
testimonials.robert: This course hasn't just taught basic structures and logic for programming, but it instills some basic tenets of the coder's mindset that will be invaluable on your journey (how to start from a blank screen, breaking big impossible challenges into the smallest solvable pieces, creating more efficient, readable, and maintainable code).
testimonials.karen: I have next to no coding experience yet have found this course to be so intelligently scaffolded, with concepts clearly explained and logically built one after the other, making the information accessible to learn.
testimonials.kcash: This course gives you the tools to think through the process before even writing a single line of code which makes the actual coding part easier. Having a good mental model helps with understanding what's 'under the hood'
testimonials.drac: The resources are fantastic but it is Jeremy's knack of breaking things down into the smallest possible steps that has really helped things click for me. I've learned an unbelievable amount in a few short weeks and I'm now solving problems with code that I would never have thought possible!
testimonials.jj: Jeremy and the mentors have created an amazing resource like no other on the web. From the fun and sleek interface, to the live classes and labs or the discord discussions, it all comes together to make a superb learning experience.
testimonials.nanouss: Enrolling in this programming course was one of the best decisions I've ever made. The curriculum is well-structured, covering foundational programming concepts. The team is supportive, and truly invested in helping students succeed.
testimonials.thom: You will not believe how fantastic this course is! You learn to write code by writing code to solve problems that match--and push--your abilities. Jeremy is a master teacher. Jiki is the perfect environment.
testimonials.chris: For nearly a decade, I've repeatedly started online coding courses, but every time I run up against something that didn't make sense or a problem I just couldn't solve which stopped me in my tracks, meaning I have never completed a course, but now after years of trying, suddenly, coding feels possible.

page.heading: Jiki Premium
page.subheading: Accelerate your road to job-ready. Unlock every course, every project, unlimited AI support, and everything else Jiki has to offer.

table.comparePlansDesc: Here's what's included in each plan, so you can choose with confidence.

features.codingExercisesDesc: Learn by doing with our growing library of interactive exercises.
features.conceptLibraryDesc: Bite-sized lessons covering every coding concept you need to know.
features.jikiProjectsDesc: Combine the skills you've learned into real, end-to-end projects.
features.talkToJikiDesc: Get unstuck with AI-powered hints and explanations from Jiki.
features.buildingFundamentalsDesc: Watch Jeremy build a web platform from scratch — servers, databases, auth, and more.
features.howThingsWorkDesc: Deep dives into the trickier bits of Exercism and Jiki, and why they're built that way.
features.earlyAccessDesc: Try out new features before everyone else.
features.communityForumsDesc: Ask questions and learn alongside other Jiki students.
features.livestreamsDesc: Join live Q&A sessions where Jeremy answers your coding and building questions.
features.certificatesDesc: Show off what you've learned with shareable certificates.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.q1: Can I try Jiki for free?
faq.a1: Yes! You can sign up for free and use the Basic plan for as long as you like. Upgrade to Premium whenever you need full access — there's no obligation.
faq.q2: Is there a minimum contract length?
faq.a2: No minimum contract — Premium is billed monthly and you can cancel at any time from your account settings.
faq.q3: What happens if I cancel my Premium subscription?
faq.a3: You'll keep Premium access until the end of your current billing period, and then your account will move back to the Basic plan. You don't lose any of your progress — you just lose access to Premium-only features.
faq.q4: Do you offer discounts for students or those who can't afford Premium?
faq.a4Prefix: We want Jiki to be accessible to everyone. If cost is a barrier, please
faq.a4Suffix: and we'll do what we can to help.
faq.q5: Can I upgrade or downgrade later?
faq.a5: Absolutely. You can upgrade to Premium at any time from your account, and you can cancel just as easily whenever you'd like.

cta.alreadyPremiumDesc: Thanks for supporting Jiki — enjoy full access to everything!
cta.upgradeDesc: Upgrade to Premium and unlock everything Jiki has to offer.
cta.freeDesc: Get started today for free and access hundreds of hours of free content. Upgrade to Premium when you want to go even deeper.

page.heading: Roadmap
page.subheading: Where Jiki is heading. A quarter-by-quarter view of what we're shipping, what's next, and what we're still dreaming up.
page.disclaimer: This roadmap is a snapshot of our current plans. Priorities shift as we learn from our community, so dates and scope may change.

changelog.title: Changelog
changelog.subtitle: Recent improvements we've shipped to Jiki.
changelog.entry1Description: Jiki is officially live (albeit in beta!)

phases.nowSummary: What we're focused on this month.
phases.nowItem1Description: Now that Jiki is live, we're spending June squashing bugs and smoothing rough edges as real learners use the platform. Expect a steady stream of small fixes and quality-of-life improvements across the app.
phases.nowItem2Description: We're reading every message, support thread, and suggestion that comes in. The most impactful pieces of feedback are being turned into tweaks and small features so the experience improves week by week.
phases.nowItem3Description: Behind the scenes we're tightening up reliability, performance, and observability so we have a rock-solid base to build the next wave of features on. Less visible, but the most important work we can do right now.
phases.nextItem1Title: Move from Beta to Fully Live
phases.nextItem1Description: Jiki is currently in beta. Once the launch dust settles, we'll drop the beta label and graduate to a fully-live product, with stronger guarantees around reliability, a clearer pricing story, and a polished onboarding flow. This is also when we'll send the launch email to the Exercism community and kick off promotional pushes with our partners.
phases.nextItem2Description: Launching July 11th, this is a brand new series where Jeremy builds real, useful projects from scratch alongside learners. Each project will be broken down into bite-sized lessons, showing not just the code but the thinking, mistakes, and decisions that go into shipping software.
phases.nextItem3Description: Long-form videos that go beyond the core lessons to explore concepts in real depth. Perfect for learners who want to understand the why behind the how, and to see how ideas connect to the wider world of programming.
phases.nextItem4Title: Add first translations to other languages
phases.nextItem4Description: Bringing Jiki to learners in their own language, starting with European Portuguese, Spanish, Japanese, and Brazilian Portuguese. The whole interface and curriculum will be translated, not just the marketing pages.
phases.futureSummary: On the horizon. Subject to change as we learn.
phases.futureItem1Description: A fully-fledged Python track that mirrors the depth of our JavaScript curriculum. Same exercise philosophy, same step-through visualiser, same level of polish, but with Python as the language of instruction.
phases.futureItem2Description: Expanding Jiki to ten additional spoken languages so even more learners can use the platform in their native tongue. We'll prioritise based on demand from the community and where we can have the biggest impact.

chooseLanguage.tooltip: Select one of the options to proceed.
chooseLanguage.questionTitle: Choose which language you want to learn?
chooseLanguage.videoInstructionPrefix: Watch the video then choose your language. Already know?

deleteAccount.deletedSubtitle: We're sorry to see you go. We hope you've enjoyed Jiki. Good luck with your coding journey!
deleteAccount.errorSubtitle: There has been an error deleting your account. We have been notified and will delete it manually for you.
deleteAccount.expiredSubtitle: This deletion link is no longer valid. It may have already been used or has expired.
deleteAccount.expiredSecondary: If you still want to delete your account, please log in and request a new deletion link from your settings.

errorPage.serverErrorMessage: We encountered an unexpected error. Sorry about that!
errorPage.notFoundMessage: Looks like we can't find that page. Sorry!

testimonialsPage.title: Testimonials
testimonialsPage.subtitle: We asked our students if they'd enjoyed the course. Here's what they said...

achievements.title: Achievements - Jiki
achievements.description: Track your progress and unlock achievements as you learn to code.

build.title: Learn to Build - Jiki
build.description: Watch video series on building real projects, deep-dives into how things work, and live Q&A sessions.

dashboard.title: Dashboard - Jiki
dashboard.description: Track your learning progress, continue coding exercises, and view your achievements.

projects.title: Projects - Jiki
projects.description: Build real-world coding projects to practice your programming skills and create portfolio pieces.

settings.title: Settings - Jiki
settings.description: Manage your account settings, subscription, and preferences.

checkEmail.title: Check your email - Jiki
checkEmail.description: We've sent you a confirmation email. Check your inbox to verify your address and finish signing up.

login.title: Log In - Jiki
login.description: Sign in to your Jiki account

home.title: Jiki - Learn to Code the Fun Way
home.description: The best way to learn to code and build in the LLM-era! By the team behind Exercism

premium.title: Premium - Jiki
premium.description: Accelerate your road to job-ready with Jiki Premium. Full access to courses, projects, AI support, and more.

roadmap.title: Roadmap - Jiki
roadmap.description: What we're building next on Jiki. A quarter-by-quarter look at upcoming courses, projects, and features.

testimonials.title: Testimonials - Jiki
testimonials.description: We asked our students if they'd enjoyed the course. Here's what they said.

unsubscribePreferences.title: Email Preferences - Jiki
unsubscribePreferences.description: Manage your email preferences and unsubscribe from Jiki emails.

subscription.loginRequired: Please log in to upgrade your account
subscription.checkoutFailed: Failed to start checkout process. Please try again.

auth.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.

welcomeToPremium.description: Thanks for upgrading! You now have access to all Premium benefits, including unlimited chats with Jiki, Projects, and Build with Jeremy!

chatGate.title: Welcome to AI Chat!
chatGate.description: Your AI assistant is now unlocked and ready to help with your coding exercises.

featureGate.title: Feature Unlocked!
featureGate.description: You now have access to premium features that will enhance your learning experience.

settings.title: Welcome to {tier}!
settings.description: Your subscription has been activated. Explore your new features in the settings.

general.title: Welcome to {tier}!
general.description: Thank you for upgrading your plan. You now have access to all premium features.

subscriptionSuccess.renewalNotice: Your subscription will renew automatically on {date}. Manage your subscription in Settings.

confirmation.defaultMessage: Are you sure you want to proceed?

connectionError.title: Whoops! Lost connection
connectionError.subtitle: Jiki got a little tangled up and dropped the connection. Don't worry though - we're working on getting things plugged back in!
connectionError.helpTextPrefix: Just sit tight - this usually fixes itself in a few moments.

sessionExpired.title: Session Expired
sessionExpired.description: Your session has expired. Please log in again.

paymentVerificationFailed.title: We couldn't confirm your payment
paymentVerificationFailed.description: Something went wrong while checking with Stripe. Try refreshing the page in a moment — if Premium still isn't active, contact support.

levelMilestone.title: 🎉 Level Complete!
levelMilestone.message: Congratulations! You've successfully completed {levelTitle} and mastered all its concepts.
levelMilestone.readyNext: You're now ready to unlock the next level and continue your learning journey!

authError.title: You've been Logged out.
authError.subtitle: For some reason you've been logged out (maybe a security check, maybe you logged out on a different device?). Please reload the page to continue.

rateLimit.title: You've moved too fast.
rateLimit.subtitle: You've sent too many requests to our servers and so we're putting you on pause for a few seconds. Please wait and you'll be automatically reconnected.
rateLimit.noteText: Opening new tabs or making additional requests will extend your wait time.

exerciseSuccess.defaultMessage: All tests passed! You've successfully completed this exercise.

welcome.title: Welcome to Jiki!
welcome.subtitle: Watch this short video to get started.
welcome.skipMessage: This video helps you get the most out of Jiki. Are you sure you want to skip it?

chatGate.headline: Unlock AI Chat Assistant
chatGate.description: Get instant help with your coding exercises from our AI assistant.

featureGate.headline: Unlock {feature}
featureGate.description: Upgrade your plan to access advanced features and enhanced learning experiences.

settings.headline: Choose Your Plan
settings.description: Select the subscription plan that best fits your learning needs.

general.headline: Upgrade Your Plan
general.description: Choose the plan that fits your learning goals and unlock advanced features.

subscription.renewNotice: Your subscription will renew automatically each month. You can cancel anytime from your settings.

walkthroughConfirm.title: Try solving it yourself first?
walkthroughConfirm.intro: Before watching the Deep Dive, you might want use these resources to help you pass the tests yourself:
walkthroughConfirm.conceptPagesText: — review the concepts used in this exercise
walkthroughConfirm.askJikiText: — get personalised help from Jiki without spoilers
walkthroughConfirm.whatHappenedText: — step through your code line by line to see what went wrong
walkthroughConfirm.revealHintsText: — read through all the hints above for guidance

paymentConfirming.title: Confirming your payment…
paymentConfirming.description: Hang tight while we confirm your payment with Stripe. This usually only takes a moment.

paymentProcessing.title: Payment Processing
paymentProcessing.description: Thank you. We're waiting for your payment provider to send us the funds. Once they do we'll upgrade your plan to Premium and send you an email.

success.title: All tests passed!
success.messageExercise: Great work! You're ready to complete this exercise and move on to the next challenge.
success.messageProject: Great work! You're ready to complete this project and move on to the next challenge.

conceptUnlocked.title: Concept unlocked!
conceptUnlocked.messageGeneric: You've unlocked a new concept to explore.

completed.messageExercise: Great work completing {title}! Ready to continue to the next exercise?
completed.messageProject: Great work completing {title}! Ready to continue to the next project?

difficultyRating.title: Rate your experience
difficultyRating.message: Help us improve {title} by rating it.

projectUnlocked.title: Project unlocked!
projectUnlocked.message: All that practice means you're ready to combine what you've learned in a new project.
projectUnlocked.premiumInfoSuffix: to access all the Projects as you unlock them.

basic.subheading: Upgrade to Premium to accelerate your road to job-ready.
basic.note: + Access to public YouTube videos and community forums for additional learning resources.

subscriptionCheckout.unexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
